name: Dr. Ahsan Islam
title: Senior Lecturer in Biochemical Engineering
bio: Expert in metabolic engineering and synthetic biology with extensive research experience at MIT, University of Toronto, and Imperial College London. Specializes in constraint-based metabolic modeling, genome-scale analysis, and microbial production of platform chemicals. Has 15+ years of research experience and 30+ publications in high-impact journals.
qualifications: Ph.D., Chemical Engineering and Applied Chemistry, University of Toronto, 2014
M. Sc., Chemical Engineering, Imperial College London, 2005
B. Sc. Eng., Chemical Engineering, BUET, 2003

name: Tamoghna Das
title: UKRI Scholarship Student
bio: Developing a digital twin of bioprocesses to optimize media and feeding strategies for industrial cell culture processes. Focus on high-throughput screening and multivariate data analysis to create predictive computational models. Previously completed MSc in Biochemical Engineering at UCL and Data Science at University of East Anglia.
qualifications: M.Sc., Biochemical Engineering, University College London (Merit)
M.Sc., Data Science, University of East Anglia (Merit)
B.Tech., Biotechnology, Vellore Institute of Technology
